name: RocketReach API
what_it_does: B2B contact data API providing verified email addresses, phone numbers, and professional profiles for individuals and companies. RocketReach searches and verifies contact information across social networks and public sources. Used by sales teams and agent-driven outreach pipelines that need reliable contact data to reach prospects.
use_cases: Look up verified email addresses and phone numbers for sales prospects in agent-driven outreach automation pipelines
Enrich CRM records with verified contact data (email, phone, LinkedIn URL) for agent-powered sales engagement workflows
Bulk enrich prospect lists with contact information for agent-managed email or phone outreach campaigns
Find decision-makers at target companies by role/title for agent-driven account-based sales workflows
Verify email validity before sending in agent email campaigns to reduce bounce rates and protect sender reputation
not_for: Consumer contact lookup — RocketReach is B2B/professional contacts only
International markets outside US/Europe — coverage varies significantly by geography
Teams needing free or low-cost data — RocketReach is priced for commercial sales use cases
best_when: You need verified B2B contact data (email + phone) for agent-driven outreach, with better phone number coverage than Hunter.io or Apollo.io.
avoid_when: You need consumer data, comprehensive company-level analytics (use Apollo.io or Clearbit), or you're outside North America and Europe.

auth.notes: API key passed in Authorization header or as query parameter. Keys from RocketReach account settings.

pricing.notes: Lookup-based pricing where each profile retrieval consumes credits. API access requires at least Essential plan. Bulk lookup available for list enrichment.

performance.rate_limits: API rate limits not publicly documented; standard per-plan limits apply

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Standard REST JSON errors. Lookup failures return profile status indicating not-found vs. data-unavailable. Error messages are functional.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: All lookup operations are read-only and idempotent. Lookups consume credits on success — agents should cache results to avoid re-consuming credits for the same person.
known_agent_gotchas: Credits are consumed on successful data return — even partial results (email only, no phone) consume credits
Phone number coverage varies significantly by geography — US/Canada have better coverage than EU or APAC
Data freshness varies — email addresses may be from previous employers; always verify before large outreach campaigns
GDPR compliance requires assessing legal basis for processing EU contact data — B2B legitimate interest is common but requires documentation
Bulk enrichment API has different rate limits than single-lookup — plan accordingly for large list enrichment jobs

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. GDPR/CCPA compliant. Contact data aggregated from public professional sources. Privacy review required for EU B2B use cases.
